morning_window_alert: CRITICAL: Morning window (06:00-12:00 UTC, 68-71% WR, BEST window) opens in ~5.5h. Bot is OFFLINE. Start immediately: cd bot && python run.py paper

anomalies.description: Insight 5 (LONG bias) claimed 74% of trades are LONG with 30% WR. 10d data shows only 12% LONG. Insight was suppressing SOL_LONG 70-80% signals (62% WR, +$20.88 avg, n=208). Insight 6 (morning 14% WR on n=7) contradicted Insight 1 (morning 71% WR on n=20).
anomalies.status: FIXED_RUN90: Both insights invalidated. Expected +$418-$1,059/100d EV recovery.
anomalies.recommendation: Monitor SOL_LONG signal frequency post-restart to verify Insight 5 suppression is lifted.
